commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
import cv2

# 打开摄像头（0 是默认 USB 摄像头）
cap = cv2.VideoCapture(0)

if not cap.isOpened():
    print("❌ Camera not found")
    exit()

print("✅ Camera connected")

while True:
    ret, frame = cap.read()
    if not ret:
        print("❌ Failed to read frame")
        break

    # 显示画面
    cv2.imshow("Print Bed View", frame)

    # 按 q 退出
    if cv2.waitKey(1) & 0xFF == ord('q'):
        break

cap.release()
cv2.destroyAllWindows()
